name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent equipment maintenance causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide a preventative maintenance tracker instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules and work orders.
problem_solved: Inconsistent equipment maintenance leading to tenant dissatisfaction
